hero.badge: Turkey's Leading LED Screen Rental Company
hero.subtitle: From concerts to corporate events, from fairs to festivals, we offer professional LED screen and panel rental services at every scale.

features.sectionDesc: With years of experience and state-of-the-art equipment, we make a difference at your events.
features.highResDesc: LED panels offering perfect image quality for every distance from P2.5 to P10.
features.proSetupDesc: Fast and safe installation with our experienced team, pre-event testing and calibration.
features.reliableDesc: Uninterrupted event experience with backup equipment guarantee and instant response.
features.supportDesc: Expert technician support and instant troubleshooting throughout your event.

services.pageDesc: Professional LED screen rental and technical support services for every organization from concerts to corporate events.
services.preview1Desc: Reach thousands with giant LED screens.
services.preview2Desc: Crystal clear image for professional presentations.
services.preview3Desc: Make your stand stand out with LED technology.
services.processDesc: Perfect LED solution for your event in four simple steps.
services.step1Desc: We learn the details of your event.
services.step2Desc: We prepare a custom LED screen plan for you.
services.step3Desc: We safely install and test the equipment.
services.step4Desc: We provide technical support throughout the event.
services.ctaDesc: Contact us now for the most suitable LED screen solution for your needs.

products.pageDesc: We offer solutions for every need with our wide product range in different pixel pitches suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
products.compareDesc: Let us help you choose the right LED panel for your usage area.
products.ctaDesc: Share your event details and let our expert team suggest the most suitable product and price.

gallery.pageDesc: Images from our completed projects. Each one is a reflection of our professional team's careful work.
gallery.empty: No images found in this category.

references.pageDesc: Insights from our valued clients we have worked with over the years and their experiences.
references.testimonial1: The LED screens we rented for our concert were excellent. Fast setup, outstanding image quality.
references.testimonial2: The service we received for our fair stand exceeded our expectations. I definitely recommend.
references.testimonial3: Professional team, quality equipment and flawless support. LEDEkran is our choice for every event.

contact.pageDesc: Contact us to discuss your project, get a price quote, or ask your questions.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully! We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.quickContactDesc: For urgent needs, you can call us directly or reach us via WhatsApp.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Share details about your project... (Event date, venue, screen size, etc.)

cta.title: Get a Quote for Your Project
cta.desc: Share the details of your event, and we'll provide you with the best LED screen solution and price quote.

footer.desc: We make your events unforgettable with professional LED screen and panel rental services. Serving nationwide in Turkey.

cookie.message: This website uses cookies to enhance your experience.
